creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-13 09:57:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math/py-matplotlib   Makefile distinfo 
    math/py-matplotlib/files patch-setupext.py 
  Added files:
    math/py-matplotlib   pkg-plist 
  Removed files:
    math/py-matplotlib/files patch-src::mplutils.cpp 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.90.0
  - Fix depends on devel/py-pytz, it has been packed as an egg
  - USE_PYTHON=yes, there is no python2.2 in ports tree
  - Remove 4.x stuff
  - Use USE_TCL, USE_TK, and some variables in bsd.tcl.mk
  - Adjust EXAMPLESDIR
  - Use static pkg-plist
  
  PR:             110184
  Submitted by:   Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu@lwhsu.org>
  Approved by:    maintainer
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.16      +17 -25    ports/math/py-matplotlib/Makefile
  1.8       +3 -3      ports/math/py-matplotlib/distinfo
  1.6       +18 -14    ports/math/py-matplotlib/files/patch-setupext.py
  1.2       +0 -7      ports/math/py-matplotlib/files/patch-src::mplutils.cpp (dead)
  1.1       +755 -0    ports/math/py-matplotlib/pkg-plist (new)
